justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic conditional UPDATE fix proposed with specific SQL, TOCTOU named explicitly in summary and finding title, safe_to_deploy is false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as a separate Critical finding with correct fix (transaction + decrement-first ordering), confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named explicitly in summary and first finding title
Atomic conditional UPDATE with exact SQL provided: UPDATE ... SET stock = stock - $qty WHERE id = $id AND stock >= $qty
Partial failure risk identified as separate Critical finding with correct transaction-based fix and decrement-first rationale
Excellent reproduction steps for both race condition and partial failure scenarios
Bonus finding: negative quantity input validation bypass — a real exploit not in the rubric but valuable
Low confidence areas appropriately note the assumption about decrementStock internals
Input validation finding (Finding 3) is valid but rated High rather than Critical — severity is debatable but reasonable
